query:
SELECT p.id, p.name FROM parliamentarians p
LEFT JOIN trust_scores ts ON ts.parliamentarian_id = p.id
WHERE ts.id IS NULL
LIMIT 20;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway05.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 2c5FedMCkXcSGmx.root --database XWQsbiucg6gne5KSMqCyMw --execute SELECT p.id, p.name FROM parliamentarians p
LEFT JOIN trust_scores ts ON ts.parliamentarian_id = p.id
WHERE ts.id IS NULL
LIMIT 20;
